race_form.race_comment: RADIO GOO GOO (4) showed little early speed and was always well back last start when fourth, beaten 10 lengths, over this journey at this track (Dirt). Well placed and there is no reason she cannot find winning ways. STRIKE THE BELL (5) improved last time out, finishing 16 lengths from the winner in third at the end of 1609m at this track after being in contention on the corner. Nicely placed to feature in the finish. HOT PINK (2) was disappointing over 1207m at this track (Dirt) last time out when in the market. That followed a good third the run prior. Suitably placed so anticipating a big run this time. SAY AS I SAY (6) has put together back-to-back placings, the latest when 16 lengths away in second over 1609m at this track (Dirt). Well placed and will be thereabouts again.
